rac_single:
0: (bf) r6 = r1
1: (85) call pc+3#select_branch
2: (85) call pc+17#shared_suffix
3: (bf) r0 = r6
4: (95) exit
select_branch:
5: (15) if r1 == 0x0 goto pc+2
6: (85) call pc+5#select_a
7: (05) goto pc+2
8: (85) call pc+5#select_s
9: (05) goto pc+0
10: (95) exit
11: (bf) r0 = r0
select_a:
12: (b7) r0 = 0
13: (95) exit
select_s:
14: (b7) r0 = 0
15: (95) exit
16: (bf) r0 = r0
17: (bf) r0 = r0
18: (bf) r0 = r0
19: (bf) r0 = r0
shared_suffix:
20: (b7) r1 = 0
21: (85) call 2
22: (95) exit
